service.name: Discord
service.description: Voice, video and text communication platform

api_access.conditions: Discord API available with bot tokens. Gateway API for real-time events, REST API for actions. Bots must comply with bot verification requirements.

scrape_data.conditions: Scraping and unauthorized automation are prohibited. Use the Discord API and bots with proper bot tokens.

allow_training.conditions: Discord prohibits using content from the platform to train AI models.

automated_messaging.conditions: Bots must comply with Discord Developer Policy. No spam or unsolicited messages.
